stemHtml: Which of the following options correctly lists errors that affect the accuracy and reliability of the Satellite-Assisted Navigation system (GNSS/GPS)?

options.a: Satellite mutual interference, frequency drift, and satellite to ground time lag.
options.b: Satellite clock, satellite ephemeris, and ionospheric propagation.
options.c: Satellite to ground time lag, atmospheric propagation, and satellite clock.
options.d: Satellite mutual interference, satellite ephemeris, and atmospheric propagation.
